name: Style Guide for KB articles
body:
[{"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Style Guide for KB articles"}], "data-id": "style-guide-for-kb-articles"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article contains information on the various styling rules used within the Retail Express Knowledge Base. All articles should follow these conventions to ensure a consistent approach to articles. For further information please contact the Content Manager."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "The Zendesk HC theme we use supports Bootstrap."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Do not use the \"attachments\" feature of Zendesk. Our Knowledge Base is not indexed by Google, however a bug in zendesk means that attachments are indexed. Please contact Kelly to upload files to the media server for you instead."}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#formatting", "children": [{"text": "Formatting"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#", "children": [{"text": "File Download link"}]}, {"text": ""}, {"text": "(add the class \"download-link\" to the a tag to use the icon and ensure text is centered)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Navigation text ", "bold": true}, {"text": "separated by a >"}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "e.g. "}, {"text": "CRM > Customers", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Button labels should be in "}, {"text": "bold ", "bold": true}, {"text": "e.g. Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bullet points - numbered (use when a the points need to be followed/actioned in specific order)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Bullet points - dot points (use when providing a list, but the order isn't specific)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Italic", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Captions"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#Top", "children": [{"text": "Return to Top"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#language", "children": [{"text": "Language"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(e.g. insert detail of an example here)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "(i.e. insert detail to clarify or add information to the previous statement)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "General notes on language:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- any reference to a Retail Express program, pathway, menu or heading should be capitalised, but nouns should not e.g. Settings, products"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- any 'how-to' or 'steps' should begin with a verb (e.g., Click, Select, Copy, Go to)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- the use of a button should always be referred to as \"click\" not \"press\" or \"tap\""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If it's a common FAQ:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Requires a lot of information: write a new article, but link the original configuration article to the new one under an \"FAQ\" section at the bottom under the \"Want more information\" heading"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Small information: include as an FAQ with expand/collapse function at the bottom of the original article"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#highlights", "children": [{"text": "Highlight Boxes"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Edit the html and use \"
\" at the start of the section, and \"
\" at the end of the section to use the highlight. Use regular paragraph in strong for a heading."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphc8EAA.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphc8EAA.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage - 2023-07-10T021206.442.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#labels", "children": [{"text": "Labels"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Use of Labels", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- Use single words (where possible) instead of phrases"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- do not use multiple variations of the same word (e.g., plurals or past tense)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- do not duplicate words contained in the title as labels"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- do use common misspellings and synonyms"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "- If the article is linked to from within Retail Express it should have the tags rex-incontext."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#images", "children": [{"text": "Images"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Information on images:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Always include relevant sample information in the screenshot where possible (no blank fields)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Centre aligned"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Image should appear directly after the relevant content text or information"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Emphasised sections in the image should appear as a red transparent frame (no fill)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Replace with dummy information or blur private or sensitive information"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "File name - ", "bold": true}, {"text": "the file name of the image should be in the format of \"window_relevantcontent\" e.g. possettings_samplesettings.jpg"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Image zoom in:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you have a large image that can't be displayed clearly within the body of the article it's possible to implement a \"click to view full-sized image\" gallery feature."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Example:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiEIEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiEIEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "rtaImage - 2023-07-10T021221.027.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This is done by inserting a link to the image with data-fancybox code. The code for this feature is:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": ""}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "with a closing following the image information."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the image above as an example:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "

"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The link for the image can be found after inserting the image and referring to the img src=\"thislink\"."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "#collapsing", "children": [{"text": "Collapsing sections"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Collapsing sections:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Vertical accordion:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "

  • Tab 1 (Active)

This uses bootstrap, and is formatted with the following div classes (note the entire video section has to be wrapped in a div container listed below):"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Container: div class=\"container\""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Row: div class=\"row\""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Cells: div class=\"col-sm-12 col-md-4 video-series-headings\""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "e.g."}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "

Template"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Video-How-to-Duplicate-a-Purchase-Order", "children": [{"text": "Duplicate an Order"}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiEhEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiEhEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "250createposlide.jpg"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
